case_title: NEPHTALI GONZALES VS. LEADERSHIP HIGH SCHOOL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, NEPHTALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEADERSHIP HIGH SCHOOL A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION $8,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,625.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEADERSHIP HIGH SCHOOL A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, NEPHTALI AS TO DEFENDANT LEADERSHIP HIGH SCHOOL A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,794.56 AS TO DEFENDANT LEADERSHIP HIGH SCHOOL A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION
